message:
The other day, I was rummaging through my closet and found my old go-bag from a few years ago. I thought, "Wow, I’m so prepared!" Then I opened it up and found a mix of expired snacks, an old magazine, and a single sock. 😂 It was a real comedy of errors! 

It hit me how easy it is to think we’re ready when, in reality, a little refresh can go a long way. After a good laugh, I decided it was time to update my supplies and make a solid plan. 

Have you ever had a moment like that where you thought you were prepared, but reality said otherwise? 🤔 This little refresher helped me get back on track!
